title: The Context Theory of Relationships
summary: A perspective on why durable relationships are built on shared context rather than surface-level traits.
excerpt: A practical reflection on the role of shared context in building meaningful relationships.

title: You Don't Need Prompt Engineering to Talk to AI
summary: A practical guide to getting better results from LLMs using conversation clarity instead of overly complex prompt templates.
excerpt: A concise framework for using AI chats effectively by focusing on context, constraints, and iterative steering.

title: How I Vibe Coded a Custom Telegram Downloader (Because Browser Throttling is the Worst)
summary: Build notes on creating TeleDM to solve fragile large-file Telegram downloads with a more reliable manager-style architecture.
excerpt: Why Telegram large downloads fail and how a queue-driven, MTProto-based architecture improves reliability.

title: Exploring RAG with 3GPP Specs
summary: A deep dive into using Retrieval-Augmented Generation with complex 3GPP technical specifications for enhanced information retrieval.
excerpt: A technical walkthrough of applying RAG pipelines to dense telecom specifications and standards.

title: Bias Buster
summary: A CTF write-up on identifying feature-level bias in an ML loan-approval model using exploratory analysis.
excerpt: A practical CTF analysis workflow for discovering biased features in a machine learning classifier.

title: Unveiling the Unknown
summary: A cryptography and reverse-engineering CTF write-up documenting a practical step-by-step solve path.
excerpt: A concise walkthrough from cipher identification to bytecode analysis and final flag recovery.
